landing.heroSubtitle: Find Instagram and TikTok profiles by keywords, hashtags and location. Export to your CRM in one click and close more deals.
landing.featuresTitle: From first lead to closed deal
landing.featuresSubtitle: Tools designed to scale outbound without wasting time.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Scale when you need. Cancel anytime.
landing.trustStrip: No credit card for trial · Cancel anytime · Data protected
landing.featureSearchDesc: Keywords, hashtags and location filters. Results in minutes, not hours.
landing.featureFastDesc: Smart queue and background processing. You set it up and follow everything from the dashboard.
landing.featureExportDesc: Export to CSV and feed your pipeline without copy-paste.
landing.featureSecurityDesc: Best practices to protect your data and usage.
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Track searches and lead quality in real time.
landing.featureLeadsDesc: Tags, statuses and notes so your team can qualify and close.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: From signup to first lead in a few minutes.
landing.step1Desc: Create your account in seconds. Free trial, no credit card.
landing.step2Desc: Keywords, hashtags and filters. Instagram or TikTok.
landing.step3Desc: Download the CSV, import into your CRM and start outreach.
landing.socialProofSubtitle: Perfect for agencies, service businesses and info products that need a constant flow of profiles to contact.
landing.testimonialQuote: “Before LeadMiner I was manually hunting profiles for hours. Now I set up a search and next day I have a list ready to work.”
landing.ctaFinalSubtitle: Join teams already using LeadMiner to prospect smarter.
